description: You are a layout designer at an independent poetry press preparing a reprint of W.B. Yeats's classic collection 'The Wild Swans at Coole'. Format the raw manuscript at /home/ga/Documents/yeats_raw.docx into a print-ready chapbook layout. The document must have a page size of 5.5 inches by 8.5 inches with margins of Top: 0.75", Bottom: 0.75", Left: 1.0", and Right: 0.5". Apply the 'Title' style to the book title and 'Heading 1' style to all poem titles. Set poem body text to a 11pt serif font (Times New Roman or Liberation Serif). Include an automated Table of Contents referencing Heading 1 styles in place of the '[INSERT TABLE OF CONTENTS HERE]' placeholder and centered page numbers in the footer. Save the final document to /home/ga/Documents/yeats_chapbook_print.docx.

poem_titles: IN MEMORY OF MAJOR ROBERT GREGORY
AN IRISH AIRMAN FORESEES HIS DEATH
